description: Subset an AnnData object by cell metadata (keep or drop obs-column values) or by a gene list, useful for isolating a cell type / condition for focused re-analysis. Optionally clears stale PCA/UMAP/neighbors so downstream steps recompute cleanly.
rules: read-only input — writes a new subset.h5ad under record_store
filter cells by OBS column: provide KEEP or DROP (space-separated values)
GENES restricts to the listed genes (space-separated); genes absent from the data error out
usage: Set INPUT. Provide OBS + (KEEP|DROP), and/or GENES. Optional: RECOMPUTE_HVG=1. Output: subset.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder subset.h5ad and still passes. Multi-word obs values must be space-separated tokens.
